title: Slowcraft
description: A library for creating low-tech Progressive Crafting items, inspired by Better Than Wolves and Create.
body:
Slowcraft is a library for creating Slow Tools, 'Progressive Crafting' items inspired by the [Knitting](https://wiki.btwce.com/view/Knitting) system from the [Better Than Wolves](https://wiki.btwce.com/view/Main_Page) mod and the [Polishing](https://create.fandom.com/wiki/Sand_Paper) system from the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create/) mod.

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

![Example of a Slow Tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dde960135a26d11b97b1a0314503532468b461d3.png)

Slow Tools are intermediary items which require holding down right click to finish a 'progress bar' as represented by their durability. Upon completion, the tool breaks and gives the player items.

![Moving Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lK5knzE0/images/3c5946f8424aec74266ebe6264dd4ac74678c8f9.gif)

Now with JEI Compatibility (0.4+):

![JEI Compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5987d333a2cbc34c5fc8dbb741850ab0bf498f89.png)

This mod does nothing on its own.

**How to use this mod:**

[Slowcraft Wiki](https://github.com/nibbyy/Slowcraft/wiki)

Credit

FlowerChild and BTW CE 3.0 Community

[Ivangeevo](https://modrinth.com/user/ivangeevo) for assistance with item logic


_This library is mostly for a modpack I'm making, but anyone is free to use/utilize it._
